# Fill

**Object**

The object for setting a fill type and attachment for a component’s background fill.

## Declaration

```swift
object Fill
```

## Discussion

This is an abstract definition. Don’t use this object type directly; use only the objects that extend `Fill,` for example [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/GradientFill], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ImageFill], `and` [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/VideoFill].

## Backgrounds for Components

- **Applying a Background to a Component**: Change the appearance of the backgrounds in your article.
- **ImageFill**: The object for adding an image background fill to a component.
- **RepeatableImageFill**: The object for adding a background image that Apple News can repeat.
- **VideoFill**: The object for adding a video background fill to a component.
- **LinearGradientFill**: The object for displaying a linear gradient as a component background.
- **GradientFill**: The properties all gradient fill types share.
- **ColorStop**: The object for specifying the color and location for a color stop in a gradient.

## Inherited By

- GradientFill
- ImageFill
- RepeatableImageFill
- VideoFill
